treatment_information.treatment_response: Plasma sodium normalized and sodium was detected in the urine. Aldosterone and renin were greatly increased at 22,200 pmol/L and 14,340 mU/L, respectively.

treatment_information.dosage_or_details: Estimated to give 150% of total requirements
treatment_information.treatment_response: Did not gain weight satisfactorily until sodium chloride supplements were commenced.

treatment_timeline.event: Presented with failure to thrive, mild hyponatraemia, and dehydration. Started on high calorie formula feeds.
Plasma sodium normalized and sodium was detected in the urine. Aldosterone and renin were greatly increased.
Discharged home on sodium chloride supplements with established weight gain.
Weight was 6 kg (<3rd centile) on sodium chloride supplements and normal feeds. Plasma sodium was normal (137 mmol/L).

patient_outcome.final_status: Improved with sodium chloride supplements and normal feeds, but weight remained below the 3rd centile.
patient_outcome.follow_up_details: Last review at 8 months of age.
patient_outcome.complications: Persistent diffuse dry eczematous skin despite regular application of emollients.
patient_outcome.recovery_timeline: Within a week of sodium chloride treatment, plasma sodium normalized and weight gain improved.
